items.prompt: performs and verifies translations, rotations, and reflections in bounded grid and coordinate settings
items.expected_evidence: perform and verify rigid transformations on grids or coordinate planes in bounded cases
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner executes rigid transformations accurately and preserves the intended figure correspondence.

items.prompt: explains which properties are preserved under a rigid transformation and how symmetry creates an image/preimage relationship
items.expected_evidence: explain which lengths, angles, and orientation properties are preserved or changed by a given transformation
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner explains rigid-motion preservation and symmetry meaning beyond naming the transformation.

items.prompt: Diagnose a peer error aligned to correspondence_label_drift.
items.expected_evidence: identify corresponding points and figures under coordinate symmetry or rigid motion
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner identifies where the peer lost point correspondence or mislabeled image/preimage structure.

items.prompt: uses transformation sequences or symmetry reasoning in a less-familiar coordinate or geometric setting
items.expected_evidence: justify congruence claims through transformation sequences rather than visual resemblance alone
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner uses rigid-motion reasoning, not appearance alone, to justify congruence in a varied setting.
